Index.label: SYS.INIT // LAB68DEV STUDIO
Index.title: resume.build()
Index.description: No fluff. Just structured, ATS-friendly, brutalist resumes engineered for developers and designers.

Features.title: SYSTEM SPECS
Features.pdfDesc: Client-side rendering. Zero waiting time. Pixel-perfect brutalist PDFs generated directly in your browser.
Features.atsDesc: Clean semantic structures guaranteed to pass automated parsers and Applicant Tracking Systems.
Features.templatesDesc: Four professionally crafted architectural templates tailored for different career stages.
Features.freeDesc: No paywalls. No watermarks. Export your professional resume completely free, forever.

Templates.title: AVAILABLE TEMPLATES
Templates.executiveDesc: Dense, high-information layout for senior roles.
Templates.creativeDesc: Bold typography with avatar support for designers.

Testimonials.title: What Users Say
Testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback — 5 stars across the board
Testimonials.review1Body: Creating a CV is very easy with a clear and professional template.
Testimonials.review2Body: Minimalist interface, content-focused. Exactly the Harvard standard I was looking for. Very satisfied.
Testimonials.review3Body: The website is excellent for writing a professional CV — precise and to the point.
Testimonials.review4Body: Neo-brutalism interface paired with email login makes the whole workflow incredibly focused and seamless.

CTA.title: Ready to build?
CTA.subtitle: Compile your professional history into a pixel-perfect document.
